info.name: MeMaP - All Services (Full)
info.description:
Postman collection for all MeMaP microservices.

## Services
| Service | Port | Context Path |
|---|---|---|
| identity-service | 8088 | /identity |
| profile-service | 8082 | /profile |
| roadmap-service | 8083 | /road-map |
| learning-service | 8089 | /learning |
| notification-service | 8091 | /notification |
| roadmap-ai-service | 8085 | /ai |
| storage-service | 8088 | /storage |
| payment-service | 3000 | /api |
| api-gateway | 8090 | (proxy) |

## Setup
1. Import this collection
2. Call **Login** (Profile Service > Authentication > Login) — token is set automatically
3. All other requests use `{{token}}` via Bearer auth

item.name: 🪪 Identity Service
item.description: Port 8088 — /identity — Internal user management (accessed directly, not via gateway)
